startPoint.en: Speak to Ug at the Troll Stronghold. (via → )
startPoint.es: Habla con Ug en Troll Stronghold. (vía →)

items.name: Climbing boots
items.display: Climbing boots (or Trollheim Teleport or Trollheim tablet)

children.name: Trollheim Teleport
children.display: 4 sets of runes or tablets for Trollheim Teleport (with Eadgar's Ruse)

children.name: God Wars Dungeon Teleport
children.display: 1 set of runes for God Wars Dungeon Teleport (with The Mighty Fall)

recommended.name: Prayer
recommended.display: 43 Prayer is useful for Protect from Melee

recommended.name: Fremennik round shield
recommended.display: Fremennik round shield to reduce damage taken from troll ranged attacks

rewards.name: Uncut gem
rewards.display: A handful of uncut gems from Ug (1 uncut diamond, 2 uncut rubies and 4 uncut emeralds)

rewards.name: Trollweiss
rewards.display: A new colour of wieldable flowers

rewards.name: Romancing the Crone
rewards.display: Romancing the Crone (Unlocked at the top of Trollweiss Mountain)

rewards.name: Hell's Bells
rewards.display: Hell's Bells (Unlocked when the player is about to start sledding)

text.en: Go to the middle level of the Troll Stronghold.
text.es: Ve al nivel medio de Troll Stronghold.

text.en: Enter the cave entrance from Trollheim and go down one level.
text.es: Entra por la cueva desde Trollheim y baja un nivel.

text.en: Otherwise, enter the secret entrance from the entrance to Fremennik Slayer Dungeon (fairy ring code AJR) or Death Plateau and go up one level.
text.es: Si no, entra por la entrada secreta desde la entrada de Fremennik Slayer Dungeon (código de anillo de hadas AJR) o desde Death Plateau y sube un nivel.

text.en: Talk to Ug on the middle level of the Troll Stronghold. Offer him your help.
text.es: Habla con Ug en el nivel medio de Troll Stronghold. Ofrécele tu ayuda.

chatOptions: 1 Awww, you poor troll. What seems to be the problem?
3 Don't worry now. I'll see what I can do.

text.en: Talk to Aga in the room to the north.
text.es: Habla con Aga en la sala al norte.

chatOptions: 2 So... how's your... um... love life?

text.en: Talk to Arrg in the same room.
text.es: Habla con Arrg en la misma sala.

chatOptions: 2 Your girlfriend said you know where to find Trollweiss?

text.en: Talk to Ug again.
text.es: Habla con Ug de nuevo.

text.en: Teleport to Burthorpe and talk to Freda in the plateaus west of Burthorpe.
text.es: Teletranspórtate a Burthorpe y habla con Freda en las mesetas al oeste de Burthorpe.

chatOptions: 1 Do you know where I can find Trollweiss?

text.en: Talk to Dunstan east of the Burthorpe lodestone about a sled.
text.es: Habla con Dunstan al este de la piedra de viaje de Burthorpe sobre un trineo.

text.en: Talk to him again to give him a rope, maple or yew logs, and an iron bar.
text.es: Habla con él de nuevo para darle una cuerda, troncos de maple o de tejo, y una barra de hierro.

text.en: Use swamp tar on a wax bucket (with a cake tin in your inventory).
text.es: Usa alquitrán de pantano en un cubo de cera (con un molde de pastel en tu inventario).

text.en: Use your wax on the sled.
text.es: Usa tu cera en el trineo.

text.en: Enter the cave entrance opposite the ice gate, which located north-west of the main entrance to Troll Stronghold.
text.es: Entra por la cueva que está frente a la puerta de hielo, ubicada al noroeste de la entrada principal de Troll Stronghold.

text.en: Preferably use Trollheim Teleport here if you have it.
text.es: Preferiblemente, usa aquí el Trollheim Teleport si lo tienes.

text.en: Otherwise, you need to go through the Troll Stronghold and past Trollheim.
text.es: Si no, tendrás que atravesar Troll Stronghold y pasar por Trollheim.

text.en: Head north-west and exit the cave through the crevasse.
text.es: Dirígete al noroeste y sal de la cueva a través de la grieta.

text.en: Head south, equip your sled and slide through the slope.
text.es: Dirígete al sur, equípate el trineo y deslízate por la pendiente.

text.en: After the end of the first part of the ride, pick the Trollweiss flowers west of your location. Do not sled any further south at this point or you will have to climb the mountain again.
text.es: Después del final de la primera parte del trayecto, recoge las flores de Trollweiss al oeste de tu ubicación. No sigas deslizándote más al sur en este punto o tendrás que volver a subir la montaña.

text.en: Go back and talk to Ug.
text.es: Vuelve y habla con Ug.

steps.section: The things we do for love...

text.en: Talk to Arrg and tell him you're here to kill him. The fight will start immediately after that. Arrg also attacks immediately after the teleport, so be prepared.
text.es: Habla con Arrg y dile que has venido a matarlo. La pelea comenzará inmediatamente después. Arrg también ataca justo después de la teletransportación, así que prepárate.

chatOptions: 1 I am here to kill you!

steps.section: The things we do for love...

text.en: Kill Arrg.
text.es: Mata a Arrg.

steps.section: The things we do for love...

text.en: Return to Ug and talk to him.
text.es: Regresa con Ug y habla con él.

steps.section: The things we do for love...

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
